preflight.note: Created before implementation work starts for a Discord team/community channel adapter derived from CLV-018 roadmap records.

acceptance_criteria.text: Define Discord channel contracts for outbound messages, inbound mentions/DMs/interactions, allowed guild/channel/user identities, delivery/failure state, disabled states, and credential validation.
Implement secure bot/application credential storage and interaction/webhook validation with no token or private content leakage through renderer, logs, diagnostics, exports, or screenshots.
Add allow-list and contact/channel linking so shared Discord spaces cannot receive private agent approval details or gain authority by default.

Implement outbound status/team messages behind the channel registry with deterministic tests for send success, missing permissions, missing credentials, deleted channel, rate limit, and provider rejection.
Implement inbound interaction or mention normalization only after identity, guild/channel allow-list, duplicate event, and policy enforcement tests exist.
If buttons/slash-command quick actions ship, require signed local action payloads, expiration, replay protection, local pending-action lookup, and durable audit outcomes.
Add UI for Discord setup, allow-list management, channel/contact linking, disabled state, test send, permission health, and privacy/redaction preview.
Document shared-channel privacy limits, setup, required bot permissions, failure modes, and shipped versus deferred features.
